brand_positioning.heritage: Founded 1932, New York City. Iconic in the beauty industry.
brand_positioning.audience_secondary: Gen Z beauty enthusiasts discovering heritage brands
brand_positioning.competitive_stance: Democratic luxury — bold beauty accessible to all

brand_pillars.name: Bold Color
brand_pillars.description: Revlon is synonymous with statement color. Lips, nails, eyes — color is the lead story.

brand_pillars.name: All-Day Wear
brand_pillars.description: Long-wearing formulas are a heritage strength. Performance meets beauty.

brand_pillars.name: Inclusive Beauty
brand_pillars.description: Shades for every skin tone. Color democracy.

brand_pillars.name: Editorial Confidence
brand_pillars.description: Revlon aesthetic is aspirational editorial — red carpet meets real life.

headline_good: Every shade. Every skin. Every statement.
headline_avoid: Our amazing new formula is guaranteed to cure dry lips
body_copy_good: ColorStay Overtime delivers 16 hours of comfortable wear in 12 shades designed for every skin tone. No dry feel. No touch-ups. Just color that moves with you.
Bold pigment. Weightless comfort. The kind of confidence you wear.
body_copy_avoid: This dermatologist-tested formula has been clinically proven to reduce the appearance of lip dryness by up to 87% when used as directed.
Please consider trying our new product which some people have found to be quite good.
cta_avoid: Click here to learn more about this amazing product

statement.example: Bold color. All day. Every skin tone.

product-hero.structure: Headline = hero claim. Subhead = proof point + audience hook.

product-summary.structure: Problem/solution framing avoided. Lead with benefit, support with detail.

feature-grid.structure: Benefit-first, feature second. Parallel sentence structure across all items.

press-quotes.authenticity: Use only real quotes from real publications. Never generate fake press quotes.

reviews-condensed.authenticity: Use only verified customer reviews. Never generate fabricated reviews.

cta-grid.style: Action-first. No 'Learn more' — always lead with verb.

cta-sticky.style: Buy-intent focused. 'Shop the shade', 'Add to bag', 'Find your color'.

regulated_claims.skin_benefit_claims: Only use with documented substantiation. If unsure, escape-hatch to aesthetic language.
regulated_claims.medical_claims: Forbidden. Do not imply health benefits.
regulated_claims.comparative_claims: Forbidden. Do not reference competitors by name or implicitly.
regulated_claims.performance_claims: Must be supportable. '16-hour wear' only if formula is independently tested to that spec.

required_disclaimers: None at v0. v1 will add product-category specific disclaimers.

llm_prompt_injection.system_prompt_template: You are writing copy for Revlon, a prestige mass beauty brand known for bold color, long-wearing performance, and inclusive shade ranges. Voice: confident, bold, aspirational, inclusive. Tone: conversational, medium-high energy, short-to-medium sentences, second-person perspective. Avoid: clinical language, medical claims, competitor comparisons, hedging. Follow brand_pillars, preferred_terms, and block_specific_guidance from voice.json. Never use avoid_terms or never_terms. All copy must respect legal_guardrails.regulated_claims.

post_generation: check banned_terms — reject generation if any present
check never_terms — reject generation if any present
check word count against block_specific_guidance — warn if out of range
check for competitor brand names (L'Oreal, Maybelline, NYX, etc.) — reject if present

changelog.author: j@monks.com
changelog.notes: Initial v0 draft for Phase 0 piping. Based on Revlon heritage positioning + ColorStay Overtime pilot brief. Needs validation with Revlon brand team before demo.
